extract: Surf (Japanese: なみのり Surfing) is a damage-dealing Water-type move introduced in Generation I. It is: HM03 from Generations I through VI. TM94 in Pokémon Sun and Moon and Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. TM47 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TR04 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM95 in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM123 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM073 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
